untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection for 'Descending Broadening Formation' (diverging upper/lower trendlines) requires multi-bar trendline calculation and pattern geometry analysis not available in allowed indicators. Requires: upper trendline slope detection, lower trendline slope detection, divergence measurement, and breakout directional confirmation at formation boundary. These structural pattern components cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, oscillators, and volatility indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a chart pattern requiring trendline identification and slope analysis. The allowed indicator set lacks trendline, slope, or pattern-specific tools. AUTHOR_SILENT on success rates, target prices, and formal stop placement limits precision. Placeholder conditions use volume to trigger entries in both directions, with reversal exits. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition function or using dedicated pattern-detection library external to this rule engine.
